items.title: Mbappe scores his 10th goal of this World Cup! He passes Messi in this World Cup by 2 goals !🔥
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Mbappe scores his 10th goal of this World Cup! He passes Messi in this World Cup by 2 goals !🔥 

Also, passes Messi with all-time World Cup goals at 22 goals! 😤

He’s only 27. Messi is 39 years old and played more World Cup games than him!  

Mbappe shredding the record books.

items.title: Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are OUT tonight for the Hawks in the Vegas finale.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Kingston Flemings, Zuby Ejiofor, and Asa Newell are OUT tonight for the Hawks in the Vegas finale.

No surprise, but official that they will end Summer League w/ 4 games played each.

Also out:

Toppin — Not W/ Team
Dennis — R Achilles
Gilbert — L Adductor
McKneely — R Shoulder

items.title: FINAL: #Magic 103, Celtics 97
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
FINAL: #Magic 103, Celtics 97

Malik Reneau scores 19 points all in the second half, Au’Diese Toney reaches 18, Will Baker notches 15 points and 6 rebounds and Philip Wheeler adds 10.

Orlando wins its 4th straight contest to go 4-1 in Las Vegas under coach D.J. Bakker.

items.title: NEW: Caitlin Clark felt it before the ball was even tipped.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: Caitlin Clark felt it before the ball was even tipped.

Her mind, body and game were in alignment — and then she delivered a career-high 45pts, 10asts and the go-ahead 3 in a Fever comeback win.

On a record-breaking night, everything came together.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/caitlin-cl...

media.title: Caitlin Clark believes, delivers and makes more history for the Fever
media.description: Clark scored a career-high and franchise-record 45 points, added 10 assists and led the Fever back from an eight-point deficit to beat Seattle on Friday night.
